violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Beef stew and baked potatoes were found in the refrigerator without date markings. Potentially hazardous foods should be date marked when held for more than 24 hours.

Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Flat top grill under the left side of the hood ventilation system extends past the hood. Hood ventilation systems should cover all cooking equipment.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave and refrigerators were found dirty. Outer surfaces of cabinets and refrigerated units were also found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Soap was not provided at the sink for washing hands. Soap should be provided at all times.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Multiple floor tiles were found missing or broken in the kitchen. Flooring should be maintained in good repair so it can be easily cleaned.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
